basic_details.post_name: Consultant (Artificial Intelligence) / Consultant (Data Privacy & Cyber Security)
basic_details.short_information: Telecom Regulatory Authority of India (TRAI) Consultant (Artificial Intelligence) / Consultant (Data Privacy & Cyber Security) Notification 2026 has been released on 13 July 2026 on the official website trai.gov.in. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the TRAI Consultant (Artificial Intelligence) / Consultant (Data Privacy & Cyber Security) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years for all posts.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech./B.E. in Electronics/Electronics & Telecommunication/Electrical and Electronics/IT/Computer Science or MCA/M.Sc (Computer Science) or equivalent, M.Tech./M.E. in Electronics/Electronics & Telecommunication/IT/Computer Science or equivalent, MBA in Information Technology or Information Systems or equivalent, Certification in AI/ML/DL/Data Science (desirable for AI post), CompTIA Security+, CEH, CISSP, CISM, CISA (desirable for Cyber Security post)
qualification.details: Consultant (Artificial Intelligence): B.Tech./B.E. in Electronics or Electronics & Telecommunication or Electrical and Electronics or Information Technology or Computer Science or MCA or MSC (Computer Science) or equivalent OR M.Tech./M.E. in Electronics or Electronics & Telecommunication or Information Technology or Computer Science or equivalent OR MBA in Information Technology or Information Systems or equivalent. Desirable: Certification in AI/ML/DL/Data Science. Consultant (Data Privacy & Cyber Security): B.Tech./B.E. in Electronics or Electronics & Telecommunication or Electrical and Electronics or Information Technology or Computer Science or MCA or MSC (Computer Science) or equivalent OR M.Tech./M.E. in Electronics or Electronics & Telecommunication or Information Technology or Computer Science or equivalent OR MBA in Information Technology or Information Systems or equivalent. Desirable: CompTIA Security+, CEH, CISSP, CISM or CISA.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the TRAI Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 03-08-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of TRAI to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

rows.telecom_regulatory_authority_of_india_tr: Consultant (Artificial Intelligence) / Consultant (Data Privacy & Cyber Security)

B.Tech./B.E. in Electronics/Electronics & Telecommunication/Electrical and Electronics/IT/Computer Science or MCA/M.Sc (Computer Science) or equivalent, M.Tech./M.E. in Electronics/Electronics & Telecommunication/IT/Computer Science or equivalent, MBA in Information Technology or Information Systems or equivalent, Certification in AI/ML/DL/Data Science (desirable for AI post), CompTIA Security+, CEH, CISSP, CISM, CISA (desirable for Cyber Security post)

content_sections.heading: TRAI Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the TRAI Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download TRAI Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Consultant (Artificial Intelligence): B.Tech./B.E. in Electronics or Electronics & Telecommunication or Electrical and Electronics or Information Technology or Computer Science or MCA or MSC (Computer Science) or equivalent OR M.Tech./M.E. in Electronics or Electronics & Telecommunication or Information Technology or Computer Science or equivalent OR MBA in Information Technology or Information Systems or equivalent. Desirable: Certification in AI/ML/DL/Data Science. Consultant (Data Privacy & Cyber Security): B.Tech./B.E. in Electronics or Electronics & Telecommunication or Electrical and Electronics or Information Technology or Computer Science or MCA or MSC (Computer Science) or equivalent OR M.Tech./M.E. in Electronics or Electronics & Telecommunication or Information Technology or Computer Science or equivalent OR MBA in Information Technology or Information Systems or equivalent. Desirable: CompTIA Security+, CEH, CISSP, CISM or CISA.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years for all posts.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the TRAI Various Posts Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 03-08-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of TRAI to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the TRAI Consultant posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the TRAI Consultant (Artificial Intelligence) / Consultant (Data Privacy & Cyber Security) posts is 03 August 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Consultant posts at TRAI?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Consultant (Artificial Intelligence) and Consultant (Data Privacy & Cyber Security) positions at TRAI.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the TRAI Consultant posts?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have a B.Tech./B.E., M.Tech./M.E., or MBA in relevant fields, with desirable certifications for specific posts.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to the TRAI Consultant positions?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all Consultant posts is 45 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Consultant positions at TRAI?
faq.answer: The salary for the Consultant positions ranges from Rs. 24,00,000 to Rs. 30,00,000 per annum.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the TRAI Consultant recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category of candidates for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for the TRAI Consultant posts?
faq.answer: The application process for the TRAI Consultant positions is entirely online.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the TRAI Consultant recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes an online application followed by document verification.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for TRAI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article or from the TRAI official website.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for these Consultant positions at TRAI?
faq.answer: These positions are on a contract basis.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the TRAI Consultant posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the TRAI Consultant (Artificial Intelligence) / Consultant (Data Privacy & Cyber Security) posts is 03 August 2026.
